rubrics.name: Business Writing Standards
rubrics.description: Evaluate whether the response demonstrates professional communication, accurate system design reasoning, and alignment with real-time payments requirements such as scalability, reliability, and security.

rubrics.name: Clarity & Conciseness
rubrics.description: Evaluate how clearly the response explains complex distributed system concepts (e.g., concurrency, latency, fault tolerance) while maintaining a logical flow and avoiding unnecessary verbosity.

rubrics.name: Cultural Adaptation
rubrics.description: Evaluate whether the response reflects an understanding of diverse stakeholders (citizens, banks, regulators, international partners) and aligns with financial, regulatory, and cross-border considerations.

rubrics.name: Presentation & Formatting
rubrics.description: Evaluate the structure and organization of the response, including clear segmentation (e.g., systems, data flow, failures, trade-offs), and effective use of bullet points, diagrams, or tables for architectural clarity.
